spec_match.rationale: The active stylesheet now includes real @supports named-feature(anchor-position-follows-transforms) rules that anchor the enhanced tooltip to the transformed icon.

interactive.rationale: Visitors can pin tooltips, transform both icons, and manually preview anchor positioning when the current browser lacks the named-feature gate.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The page now delivers the progressive-enhancement behavior described by the feature index blurb.

edge_cases.rationale: Unsupported named-feature() and missing anchor-positioning primitives are reported separately, with a clear fallback and preview-disabled state.

references.rationale: Includes a ChromeStatus reference link under the 'see also' section.

design_system.rationale: The updated page uses shared design tokens, removes inline styles, and pairs all local button background and color overrides.

summary: The progressive-enhancement page now has active named-feature-gated anchor-positioning CSS, live transform and tooltip controls, separate feature/primitives detection, and a manual preview path for older browsers.
